reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Los playeros unos desagradables y muy maleducados. Contraten gente que pueda atender con respeto y no maltratadores. Atención súper lenta y deficiente. Sinceramente ACA e YPF dan vergüenza los empleados que tienen ahí. Echan a los clientes porque no te cargan nafta aunque no hay nadie y te dice que esperes en la calle hasta que el playero se deje de rascar y decida atender.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The attendants are unpleasant and very rude. Hire people who can treat customers with respect, not abusers. The service is incredibly slow and inadequate. Honestly, ACA and YPF are a disgrace; the employees they have there are shameful. They kick customers out because they won't pump gas even when there's no one around, and they tell you to wait in the street until the attendant stops scratching himself and decides to help.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbm9PbWp3RRAB
